title: Funge
description:
Befunge is an esoteric programming language known for its two-dimensional grid structure and unconventional execution flow. This game transforms its quirky mechanics into a clean, satisfying puzzle experience.

Key Features:

• Step-by-Step Learning: An interactive tutorial designed to teach you the fundamentals of Befunge from scratch.

• Clever Levels: A curated collection of puzzles built to push your logic, optimization, and creativity to the limit.

• Visual Execution: Run your code with real-time visible output, watching your instructions flow through the grid.

• Focused Experience: A distraction-free, minimalist aesthetic that lets you focus entirely on the logic.

Whether you're a veteran developer or a curious puzzle enthusiast, dive deep into one of the weirdest languages ever invented.

Minimalist interface. Maximal challenge.
description_short: A minimalist programming puzzle game based on a modified version of the esolang Befunge. Learn its unique rules, execute your code, and conquer mind-bending logic challenges.
